description_long: This is a rectangular microwave oven with a modern, minimalist design, featuring a dark gray metallic body and a large, tinted glass window on the front door. The door is bordered by a thick frame and is equipped with a vertical handle on the right side, which is metallic and cylindrical. Adjacent to the handle, there is a vertical control panel area, which appears darker and may house buttons or a digital display, though specific controls are not clearly visible. The sides and top of the microwave are smooth and unadorned, emphasizing its sleek, utilitarian appearance. The back of the microwave has a small rectangular panel, likely for ventilation or power access, but no prominent vents are visible elsewhere. The overall look is functional and robust, suitable for placement in urban kitchens, break rooms, or communal spaces.
description: A sleek, rectangular microwave with a dark gray metallic body, a large front glass window, and a vertical handle beside a control panel area. The design is modern and minimal, with smooth surfaces and subtle detailing.
description_view_0: Front view showing the large tinted glass window, vertical metallic handle, and a dark control panel area on the right.
description_view_1: Left side view displaying a plain, smooth metallic surface with no visible features.
description_view_2: Rear view showing a solid back panel with a small rectangular area, possibly for ventilation or power access.
description_view_3: Right side view with a plain, featureless metallic surface matching the left side.
attribute_control_panel_layout: The control panel is located vertically on the right side of the front face, adjacent to the door handle. It appears as a dark, rectangular area but specific buttons, dials, or touchpads are not visibly detailed. There is no clear labeling or display visible in the images.
attribute_door_handle_design: The door handle is a vertical, cylindrical bar positioned on the right edge of the door. It is metallic, extends nearly the full height of the door, and is designed for easy gripping and pulling.
attribute_vent_placement: A small rectangular panel is visible on the back, likely serving as a vent or access panel. No other vents or ventilation openings are visible on the sides, top, or front.
attribute_window_presence: A large, tinted, rectangular window is present on the front door, occupying most of the door's surface and allowing visibility into the microwave's interior.
